utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Why is not that valet back with my Porsche ?

utterances.speaker: Passerby
utterances.text: Maybe because you have got the keys ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: My fault ? ! You threatened the judge !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , you ripped the paper out of the court reporter machine ! !
